# Finding structures and structural motifs using databases

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple"}
**Stub — not yet converted.** This chapter is to be produced by the downstream conversion agent
from the source tutorial at `../structural_dbs/structural_databases.Rmd`, following
`.claude/SPEC.md` and `.claude/prompts/agent-structures.md`. Replace this whole file with the
converted chapter.
:::
